name: Black Beans and Rice
recipeIngredient: 1 15-oz can black beans, rinsed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, combine the chicken broth, margarine, and shredded coconut.
2. Bring to a boil over high heat.
3. Stir in the long-grain rice. Reduce heat to low and cover.
4. Simmer for 15 minutes or until the rice is tender and has absorbed most of the liquid.
5. Stir in the rinsed black beans and sliced green onions.
6. Cover and cook for an additional 5 minutes, or until the liquid is fully absorbed.
